name: ttt-bot
description: Custom Discord bot for Tiny Temptation Tubs (TTT) with an extensible module system.

scripts.build:app: tsc -b shared bot web-admin scripts && npm run build:admin-assets && node scripts/copy-admin-assets.js
scripts.build:admin-assets: node --input-type=module -e "import { mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/web-admin/src/ui/js', { recursive: true });" && vite build --config web-admin/vite.config.ts && esbuild web-admin/src/ui/assets/admin.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/web-admin/src/ui/js/admin.min.js --format=iife --target=es2022
scripts.build:web-admin: tsc -b shared web-admin && npm run build:admin-assets && node scripts/copy-admin-assets.js
